cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotFill

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final PotFill
    PotFill.BLACK
    A solid black fill.
    static final PotFill
    PotFill.NONE
    A fill representing no fill (transparent).
    static final PotFill
    PotFill.TRANSPARENT
    A solid transparent fill.
    static final PotFill
    PotFill.WHITE
    A solid white fill.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static PotFill
    PotFill.gradient(PotGradient gradient)
    Creates a gradient fill.
    static PotFill
    PotFill.hex(String hex)
    Creates a solid fill from a hexadecimal color string.
    static PotFill
    PotFill.none()
    Returns a fill representing no fill (transparent).
    static PotFill
    PotFill.pattern(PotFill.PatternType patternType, PotColor foregroundColor, PotColor backgroundColor)
    Creates a pattern fill with the specified pattern type and colors.
    static PotFill
    PotFill.picture(byte[] imageData)
    Creates a picture fill from raw image data.
    static PotFill
    PotFill.solid(PotColor color)
    Creates a solid fill with the specified color and full opacity.
    static PotFill
    PotFill.solid(PotColor color, double opacity)
    Creates a solid fill with the specified color and opacity.
    PotFill
    PotFill.withOpacity(double opacity)
    Returns a new fill with the same properties but a different opacity.
    Methods in cc.quaternion.potshaper with parameters of type PotFill
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    PotShape
    PotShape.fill(PotFill fill)
    Applies a complex fill to this shape.
    PotTextBox
    PotTextBox.fill(PotFill fill)
    Applies a complex fill (gradient, image, pattern, or solid) to the text box shape.
